title: Visual Verification Configuration
description: Schema for visual verification configuration in Alpha workflow tasks. Used by agent-browser to validate UI implementations.

enabled.description: Whether visual verification is enabled for this task

route.description: Route to navigate to for verification (e.g., '/home/dashboard')

base_url.description: Base URL for the dev server

wait_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait after page load before running checks

timeout_ms.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for the entire verification

checks.description: Visual checks to perform on the page

command.description: The type of check to perform

target.description: Target element text, role name, or label to find

flags.description: Additional flags to pass to the agent-browser command

expected_elements.description: List of element texts that should be visible on the page (shorthand for 'is visible' checks)

expected_roles.description: List of ARIA roles that should exist on the page

screenshot.description: Whether to capture a screenshot after verification

snapshot.description: Whether to capture an accessibility tree snapshot

fail_on_console_errors.description: Whether to fail verification if console errors are detected
